'''mavuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycomembrane|mycomembrane]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycomembrane|mycomembrane]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mavuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mævizhith|mævizhith]] || [[word:mævizhij|mævizhij]] || [[word:mævizhish|mævizhish]] || [[word:mævizhi|mævizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mavuvuzhuth|mavuvuzhuth]] || [[word:mavuvuzhuj|mavuvuzhuj]] || [[word:mavuvuzhush|mavuvuzhush]] || [[word:mavuvuzhu|mavuvuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mavuzhuth|mavuzhuth]] || [[word:mavuzhuj|mavuzhuj]] || [[word:mavuzhush|mavuzhush]] || [[word:mavuzhu|mavuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mavufzhuth|mavufzhuth]] || [[word:mavufzhuj|mavufzhuj]] || [[word:mavufzhush|mavufzhush]] || [[word:mavufzhuf|mavufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mavuzhuthu|mavuzhuthu]] || [[word:mavuzhuju|mavuzhuju]] || [[word:mavuzhushu|mavuzhushu]] || [[word:mavuzhuku|mavuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mavuzhuth|mavuzhuth]] || [[word:mavuzhuj|mavuzhuj]] || [[word:mavuzhush|mavuzhush]] || [[word:mavuzhu|mavuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mavuzhuthul|mavuzhuthul]] || [[word:mavuzhujul|mavuzhujul]] || [[word:mavuzhushul|mavuzhushul]] || [[word:mavuzhukul|mavuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mavuzhuthuthu|mavuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:mavuzhujuju|mavuzhujuju]] || [[word:mavuzhushushu|mavuzhushushu]] || [[word:mavuzhuku|mavuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mavuzhuthun|mavuzhuthun]] || [[word:mavuzhujun|mavuzhujun]] || [[word:mavuzhushun|mavuzhushun]] || [[word:mavuzhukun|mavuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mavuzhuthuoro|mavuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:mavuzhujuoro|mavuzhujuoro]] || [[word:mavuzhushuoro|mavuzhushuoro]] || [[word:mavuzhukuoro|mavuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
